mappings.rationaleAI: Directly covers subsection B2e on Confucianism as a major school of Chinese thought and its foundational role in Chinese civilization and governance.

Relevant to subsection C2c-ii on Han relations with Central Asia including Pan Ch'ao's campaigns and trade routes.

Relevant to subsection A on archaeological sources and subsection B1 on prehistoric cultures including Neolithic pottery cultures.
